content.en:
The aura of this mythical spirit was so terrifying that Ye Tian shuddered.

Escape!

He quickly fled, but the Divine Spirit's palm crossed over, shattering Ye Tian's defensive Supreme Dao Divine Power formed by the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules with one blow, and then pressed it on his arm, directly annihilating half of his body.

However, he escaped fast enough that the replica body did not fall, but only half of it disappeared, and it was in a state of heavy damage.

The spirit of the myth couldn't leave his territory and didn't continue to hunt down Ye Tian.

"Such a mythical spirit, it is estimated that except for the first patriarch, the other patriarchs are not opponents, and they can't even escape. Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately.

He changed to a replica body and continued to explore.

However, the mythical spirits here are extremely terrifying, and the mythical spirits he encountered once were directly bombarded by the other party, and he didn't even have time to escape.

"I thought my strength was terrifying, but I didn't expect it to be a big gap!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As the years passed, Ye Tian was occasionally able to find good things in the Valley of Mythology, and then sent the resources to one of the replica bodies.

this day.

Ye Tian also found a high-quality first-order supreme rule item, which only needed to use some treasures to get rid of the side effects.

"This first-order supreme rule item can be used by the stars!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian encountered a mythical spirit whose strength was not too powerful, and his strength was not as good as his, and he had the hope of killing it.

This mythical spirit stone has a snake tail and is also covered in gold.

Ye Tian's two replica bodies besieged this mythical spirit and started a big battle.

Thundered!!!!

Under the continuous fighting, this mythical spirit was finally killed by Ye Tian.

"The mythical spirits here are all powerful, if I don't master the rules of the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao, I am not an opponent at all. The First Elder estimated that he also underestimated the strength of these Mythical Spirits, most likely because too many years had passed, and the Mythical Spirits here were much stronger than in the past, and the First Patriarch's intelligence was wrong!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

After killing this mythical spirit, Ye Tian searched for treasures in the lair and territory of this mythical spirit.

As a result, I really found a lot of treasure resources.

"That's a lot of good stuff!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

All kinds of resources were collected by him, and he also found the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items, the number reached more than thirty, six innate primordial treasures, and various precious items and so on.

"Great harvest!"

Ye Tian directly occupied the lair of this mythical spirit.

Other than that.

He also found a mythical artifact, a crimson vine.

He didn't carry the Eye of Identification, so he couldn't identify this mythical spirit object, but the legendary spirit creature was able to keep a Legendary Dao Realm breaking through to the Mythical Dao Realm, and the value of this mythical spirit creature would only be higher.

"When you go out next time, take it out for identification, and you'll know what it does!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he can also let other replica bodies send the Eye of Identification in, but the Valley of Myths is dangerous after all, any crisis can occur, and he doesn't want to lose the Eye of Identification, even if it is a little risk.

In short, he can go out after five million to the Dao Era, there is no need to take risks, just wait for some more years.

......

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies stayed in the lair of the Mythical Spirit, while the other replica bodies went to explore, and once they found something good, they would send it back.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian found a lot of good things, but he still didn't find the Mythical Golden Grass.

However, he still has a lot of time, and he is not in a hurry.

Another period of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found another Mythical Spirit Territory that was stronger than him but not too strong, and used two replica bodies to drag each other, and the other replica body to collect and scrape to find resources, and harvested some resources and innate primordial treasures.

Of course, he is to get the resources and go.

Relying on this method, he had collected a lot of first-order Supreme Dao Rule items, the high-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule had obtained six pieces, and the low-quality first-order Supreme Dao Rule items had already found more than a hundred.

"Take your time like this, maybe you can collect a large number of first-order Supreme Dao rule items, and after you go out, you can use the eternal rule disk to fuse into multiple eternal sequence Supreme Dao rule items. "

As soon as he thought that he could obtain multiple Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, he would be able to comprehend the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and his realm would continue to improve.

One day after a long time.

Ye Tian, as usual, infiltrated a mythical spirit territory, and the two replica bodies dragged each other while he entered the other's lair.

Suddenly.

A touch of golden grass rooted in the void attracted Ye Tian's attention.

"Mythical Creatures!"

"Mythical Golden Grass!"

He was 100% sure that this was the Mythical Golden Grass that the First Elder needed, which could help him complete a half-step breakthrough.

Ye Tian immediately picked this mythical golden grass, and then took away other resources, and quickly escaped.

He then returned the Mythical Golden Grass to another replica body.

"The mission is done, the next thing you just need to do is wait for the time to come and get out. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Afterwards.

He doesn't need to look for the Mythical Golden Grass, he can find resources casually, and he will collect the resources that can be useful to him.

"There are too many resources in the Valley of Mythology, but there are also many dangers!"

Ye Tian spent a long time like this.

And during this period of time, he also cultivated in the Mythical Valley, using the resources in the Mythical Valley to improve his cultivation, but there was no legendary blood treasure to help refine resources, and his cultivation speed was not as good as that of the outside world.

Before he knew it, he had entered the Valley of Myths and was about to reach the Five Million Solstice Era.

At this time.

Ye Tian's mythical body completed its fifth transformation, and its strength skyrocketed again.

Then, Ye Tian changed all his copy bodies.

"Hahahaha, the body has completed the fifth transformation, and its strength has skyrocketed, some mythical spirits could be killed before, but now they can't be killed, I can sneak into their territory and snatch their resources!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

And he is also preparing to let a replica body out, after all, the special period of Mythic Valley is coming.

Another period of time has passed.

The Valley of Myths shook, and golden aurora appeared in the void.

"It's now!"

Ye Tian followed the golden aurora and rushed towards the outside of the Mythical Valley.

Rumble!!!!

The Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules protected his whole body, and then tore through the barrier, successfully leaving the Valley of Myths and returning to the Void Realm.
